---
title: "Immune Checkpoint Inhibitors in Neoadjuvant Treatment of Triple-Negative Breast Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis"
format:
  docx:
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: lancet.csl
---

{{< include 00_abstract.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 01_introduction.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 02_methods.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 03_results.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 04_discussion.md >}}

\newpage

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

\newpage

{{< include tables.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include figures.qmd >}}
